showdown.note: Need ≥3 slates; falling back to global

knobChangelog.desc: CV ceiling 0.6→1.4, offCV 0.18→0.45, POS_CV totals raised — variance model rebuilt
Soft projection ceiling scaled by team Vegas total (was flat 11 DK)
RBI_MULT/RUNS_MULT flattened — slots 5-9 raised toward the heart (35-slate backtest). Chris dates the deploy Jun 7-9; cutoff seeded at the latest plausible date.
W4: 0.5+0.5·(vt/4) → 0.4+0.6·(vt/4). Elite (5.0+) band still +1.00 under-projected across 9 post-W3 slates (n=175) — restores ~half the differential the W3 dampening over-removed.
P1: baseIP 4.85 → 4.65 (≈ -0.45 DK pts). Pitchers -1.02 mean over-projection confirmed in both windows (15 slates / 9 since 06-01, n=160); half-gap at formula level, rest stays with biasMult.

Heart (3-4) re-emerged over-projected -1.0 pts (-12%) across the 54-slate windowed backtest (orderMult.flatten raised 5-9 but LEFT 3-4 untouched). RBI_MULT 3: 1.15→1.08, 4: 1.28→1.20 — half the gap at the formula; the rest is carried by the new batOrderBiasMult sim corrector. RUNS_MULT[3-4] graded clean → untouched. Chris: set date to the actual deploy date if it slips past 06-19.

large.note: Need ≥3 post-change slates (since 2026-06-19); falling back to windowed global, then global

showdown.note: Need ≥3 post-change slates (since 2026-06-19); falling back to windowed global, then global

recs.title: Top-1% shape 5-2 gap
recs.text: Top-1% shape 5-2 gap: avg +12.8pts over 20 slates (14/20 same direction) — field generator OVER-produces 5-2 in its top-1%
